bundle.shortDescription: Debug the DV state machine + safety systems on a stopped car.
bundle.longDescription: MingoROS is the desktop companion to the mingoros CLI: a native Go/No-Go board that joins the car's ROS 2 DDS graph over Ethernet and shows the autonomous state machine, EBS / RES / ASMS safety interlocks, and mission state at a glance — for bench commissioning of a stationary Formula Student driverless car. Cross-platform native via Tauri 2.
